rows.before_notes: Instagram returned a generic app-shell/error page instead of public post metadata. | Instagram transcript auto-ingestion is not enabled yet; using metadata-only analysis. | Recovered Instagram metadata from browser-rendered page. | Recovered Instagram on-screen text from browser screenshots. | Instagram browser ingestion used worker cookies/session. | Applied sparse-text score calibration to reduce flat scoring under limited extracted evidence. | Generation origin score calibrated by trained logistic model. | Claim verification used open-source evidence heuristics.
rows.after_notes: Instagram returned a generic app-shell/error page instead of public post metadata. | Instagram transcript auto-ingestion is not enabled yet; using metadata-only analysis. | Recovered Instagram metadata from browser-rendered page. | Recovered Instagram on-screen text from browser screenshots. | Instagram browser ingestion used worker cookies/session. | Generation origin score calibrated by trained logistic model. | Claim verification attempted via OpenAI with heuristic fallback. | Rich text context detected (transcript/OCR); thresholds tuned to reduce unnecessary not_enough_evidence.

rows.before_notes: Expanded TikTok metadata using public oEmbed. | Auto-ingested TikTok metadata (author: Reuters). | TikTok transcript auto-ingestion is limited; using metadata-first analysis. | Browser-rendered TikTok page still resolved to a generic shell. | TikTok browser ingestion used worker cookies/session. | Applied sparse-text score calibration to reduce flat scoring under limited extracted evidence. | Generation origin score calibrated by trained logistic model. | Claim verification used open-source evidence heuristics.
rows.after_notes: Expanded TikTok metadata using public oEmbed. | Auto-ingested TikTok metadata (author: Reuters). | TikTok transcript auto-ingestion is limited; using metadata-first analysis. | Browser-rendered TikTok page still resolved to a generic shell. | TikTok browser ingestion used worker cookies/session. | Generation origin score calibrated by trained logistic model. | Claim verification attempted via OpenAI with heuristic fallback. | Rich text context detected (transcript/OCR); thresholds tuned to reduce unnecessary not_enough_evidence.

rows.before_notes: Could not fetch YouTube metadata via yt-dlp. | Recovered metadata from YouTube oEmbed (author: Hungry Rover). | Could not fetch YouTube transcript (disabled/unavailable). | Recovered on-screen text using frame OCR fallback. | Using deterministic YouTube thumbnail URL fallback for visual metadata checks. | Added thumbnail metadata signals (open-source fallback). | Applied sparse-text score calibration to reduce flat scoring under limited extracted evidence. | Generation origin score calibrated by trained logistic model.
